subject: DevOps
title: Defense in Depth
description: A micro-lesson that makes Defense in Depth usable.

hook.text: Every disaster in this course had one thing in common: one layer failed and nothing caught it.

buildup.text: Defense in depth uses multiple safety layers. If one fails, the next catches the problem.

discovery.text: Code review, CI tests, canary deploys, and monitoring form layers of protection.

twist.text: No single layer is perfect. Each catches different problems. The combination is the strength.

climax.text: Knight Capital lacked deploy checks. GitLab lacked backup tests. Each missed one layer.

punchline.text: Layer your defenses. Assume each will eventually fail.

quiz.question: What is the core principle of defense in depth?
options: Using multiple independent safety layers that catch different problems
